WITH product_sales_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.division,
        p.product_code,
        p.product,
        SUM(o.standard_qty + o.gloss_qty + o.poster_qty) AS total_qty_sold
    FROM hardware_dim_product p
    JOIN web_orders o ON p.product_code = o.id  -- Assuming product_code links to orders.id, though schema suggests it might not be direct
    WHERE strftime('%Y', o.occurred_at) = '2021'
    GROUP BY p.division, p.product_code, p.product
),

WITH product_sales_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.division,
        p.product_code,
        p.product,
        SUM(COALESCE(o.standard_qty, 0) + COALESCE(o.gloss_qty, 0) + COALESCE(o.poster_qty, 0)) AS total_qty_sold
    FROM hardware_dim_product p
    LEFT JOIN web_orders o ON p.product_code = o.id
    WHERE o.occurred_at IS NOT NULL 
      AND strftime('%Y', o.occurred_at) = '2021'
    GROUP BY p.division, p.product_code, p.product
),
